name: gtm-enrichment-smart
description: Multi-provider waterfall lead enrichment, fully routed via the SELAT Router (MPP/tempo). Takes an email (+ optional name) and returns person + company data by cross-referencing cheap routed APIs first (Apollo, Tomba, Brand.dev) and reaching expensive AI agents (Sixtyfour) only as fallback, with buying-signal and social-proof gap-fills.

email.description: The lead's email address, e.g. jane@acme.com. Used by the people-match, combined-find, email-verifier, tomba-enrich, and sixtyfour-lead steps.

domain.description: Company domain extracted from the email (e.g. acme.com). Used by Brand.dev retrieve, Apollo org enrich, Brand.dev AI products, and Sixtyfour company steps.

organizationId.description: Apollo organization id captured from the people-match step; required for the job-postings buying-signal step.

twitterHandle.description: Twitter/X handle discovered in Brand.dev socials or Apollo data; used by the Scrape Creators social-proof step.

steps.label: person enrich — Apollo people/match (MPP, ROUTED via SELAT Router)
person + company combined — Tomba combined/find (MPP, ROUTED via SELAT Router)
email deliverability — Tomba email-verifier (MPP, ROUTED via SELAT Router)
company brand — Brand.dev retrieve (MPP, ROUTED via SELAT Router; skip for free email)
company gap-fill — Apollo organizations/enrich (MPP, ROUTED via SELAT Router; only if funding missing)
person tie-breaker — Tomba enrich (MPP, ROUTED via SELAT Router; only if sources conflict)
person fallback — Sixtyfour enrich-lead (MPP, ROUTED via SELAT Router; only if person not found)

struct.full_name: Full legal name of this person
struct.title: Current job title

steps.label: company fallback — Sixtyfour enrich-company (MPP, ROUTED via SELAT Router; only if major gaps + >500 employees)
social proof — Scrape Creators twitter/profile (MPP, ROUTED via SELAT Router; only if Twitter handle found)
